languages.text: Тразин создает {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} области {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}конденсации твердого света{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. languages.text: Trazyn crée {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} zones de {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}Condensation de lumière solide{/g} qui durent 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. À la fin du round, tous les ennemis qui s'y trouvent entrent dans une {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}Stase de lumière solide{/g}.
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. traits.locale_text: Trazyn crée 2 zones de {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}Condensation de lumière solide{/g} qui durent 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. À la fin du round, tous les ennemis qui s'y trouvent entrent dans une {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}Stase de lumière solide{/g}.

languages.text: Trazyn, {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a}{g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}katı ışık yoğuşması{/g} alanı oluşturur. Bu alanlar 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır. Raundun sonunda bu alanlarda bulunan tüm düşmanlar, {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}katı ışık stazına{/g} girer.
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Trazyn, 2 {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}katı ışık yoğuşması{/g} alanı oluşturur. Bu alanlar 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır. Raundun sonunda bu alanlarda bulunan tüm düşmanlar, {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}katı ışık stazına{/g} girer.

languages.text: 特拉金创造{uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a}个{g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}硬光凝结{/g}区域，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。该轮结束时，区域内的所有敌人陷入{g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}硬光静滞{/g}状态。
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 特拉金创造2个{g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}硬光凝结{/g}区域，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。该轮结束时，区域内的所有敌人陷入{g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}硬光静滞{/g}状态。

languages.text: Trazyn crea {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} zonas de {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}luz sólida condensada{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Al final del asalto, todos los enemigos que estén dentro de estas zonas quedan {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}suspendidos en luz sólida{/g}.
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Trazyn crea 2 zonas de {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}luz sólida condensada{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Al final del asalto, todos los enemigos que estén dentro de estas zonas quedan {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}suspendidos en luz sólida{/g}.

languages.text: Trazyn erzeugt 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} Bereiche {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}Hartlichtkondensation{/g}. Am Ende der Runde werden alle Gegner in diesen Bereichen mit {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}Hartlichtstase{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Trazyn erzeugt 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang 2 Bereiche {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}Hartlichtkondensation{/g}. Am Ende der Runde werden alle Gegner in diesen Bereichen mit {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}Hartlichtstase{/g} belegt.

languages.text: トラズンは1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、{uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a}か所の{g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}硬質光凝縮区域{/g}を生成する。ラウンド終了時、これらの区域内の敵はすべて{g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}硬質光ステイシス{/g}に陥る。
languages.original_text: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.

traits.locale_text: トラズンは1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、{uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a}か所の{g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}硬質光凝縮区域{/g}を生成する。ラウンド終了時、これらの区域内の敵はすべて{g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}硬質光ステイシス{/g}に陥る。
